subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf! This world is indeed a narrow and darksome arena, whilst that world is infinitely luminous and vast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه این جهان بسی عرصه تنگ و تاریک و آن جهان بغایت روشن و وسیع و
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
